item.title: DEBT: Add deinit cleanup to AutoSaveManager
item.intent: NotificationCenter observers that outlive their owner cause phantom callbacks — AutoSaveManager must guarantee cleanup on deallocation
item.description: AutoSaveManager stores NotificationCenter observers as (any NSObjectProtocol)? and removes them in removeLifecycleObservers(). If stop() is never called before deallocation, the observers leak. Add deinit { stop() } to guarantee cleanup. Verify that the debounce task is also cancelled in deinit.
acceptanceCriteria: AutoSaveManager has a deinit that calls stop()
NotificationCenter observers are always removed on deallocation
Pending debounce task is cancelled on deallocation
No phantom auto-save callbacks fire after manager is deallocated
